codeReview.summary: The fix directly resolves the prior scrutiny failure by expanding Vitest's committed include scope to cover app API tests, which brings the previously dead `app/api/match-details/route.test.ts` file into `pnpm test` without regressing the existing lib test coverage.

summary: Pass: the original blocking gap was that the details route test existed outside the committed Vitest include scope. Commit `1c3fe98` updates `vitest.config.ts` from `lib/**/*.test.ts` to `lib/**/*.test.ts` plus `app/api/**/*.test.ts`, and the fix handoff records a subsequent `pnpm test -- --reporter=verbose` run that explicitly executed `app/api/match-details/route.test.ts`. Reviewing both the original feature diff and the fix diff shows no remaining dead route test file outside the committed test command's scope.
